title: Wrong evaluation of multiple OPTIONALs with the same object variable
key_bug_features: Evaluation of multiple OPTIONALs with same object variable
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE agents (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), field VARCHAR(100), work_institution VARCHAR(100), work_institutions VARCHAR(100));
INSERT INTO agents (id, name, field, work_institution, work_institutions) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 'Research', 'Institution A', NULL);
INSERT INTO agents (id, name, field, work_institution, work_institutions) VALUES (2, 'Bob', 'Development', NULL, 'Institution B');
SELECT name, field, work_institution, work_institutions FROM agents WHERE work_institution IS NOT NULL OR work_institutions IS NOT NULL;
SELECT name, field FROM agents WHERE (work_institution IS NOT NULL AND work_institutions IS NULL) OR (work_institution IS NULL AND work_institutions IS NOT NULL);
